ALTER TABLE [ODS].[ERP_PM_PROJECT_Backup_20240517]
ALTER COLUMN ProjectManager nvarchar(200); 



update p set p.projectmanager=a.DepartmentID from [ODS].[ERP_PM_PROJECT_Backup_20240517] p
left join ods.ADHOC_ERP_PM_PROJECT_backfillField_20240517 a
on p.projectmanager=a.DefContactID
where p.projectmanager is not null

 SELECT *
INTO [ODS].[ERP_PM_PROJECT_Backup_table2_20240517]
FROM [ODS].[ERP_PM_PROJECT];
